topic: How should the sk-design skill and its five nested modes (interface, foundations, motion, audit, md-generator) smartly index, retrieve, and consume the ~1,290-style design-token library at .opencode/skills/sk-design/styles/?

focus: Inventory corpus shape, quantify representative token/document characteristics, and map artifacts to sk-design hub and mode contracts
noveltyJustification: All 6 findings were new in this first iteration; none duplicated prior registry knowledge.
ruledOut: Counting every styles/ child as a style because _harness is infrastructure
Treating the prompt's ~1,290 estimate as a stable current count
Loading the full corpus into a mode context

reason: Removed duplicate initialization questions created by seeding both strategy and the initial registry.

focus: Compare committed static indexing, a structured query store, on-demand DESIGN.md grep, and a layered hybrid using repository-native precedents and measured corpus costs
noveltyJustification: 4 of 6 findings were fully new and 2 partially extended iteration 1; resolving the stale manual-index contradiction added the 0.10 simplicity bonus, yielding 0.93.
keyQuestions: Which retrieval substrate, or layered combination of substrates, best balances relevance, determinism, runtime cost, context size, and maintenance?
What should the hub and each of the five modes consume, and when should a task reference one coherent real style versus synthesize selected attributes across several styles?
Which anti-slop rules and proof gates keep outputs distinctive rather than averaging the corpus into a generic middle?
What index build, query, refresh, validation, and corpus-change tooling is justified by the repository's existing patterns?
How should utilization strategies rank by leverage versus build cost after accounting for size, staleness, licensing, provenance, and extraction fidelity risks?
ruledOut: Static-manifest-only as the final relevance ranker
Queryable database as canonical source of truth
Semantic-only primary ranking
Broad on-demand grep as the default retrieval path
sourcesQueried: read-only Python corpus and in-memory retrieval benchmark output at 2026-07-18T09:40Z

focus: Run a bounded mode-specific relevance and context-cost ablation for deterministic eligibility, BM25 top-5 ranking, and optional semantic evidence on one pinned corpus snapshot
noveltyJustification: 4 of 6 findings were fully new and 2 partially extended the prior architecture; no simplicity bonus applied because no open question closed.
keyQuestions: Which retrieval substrate, or layered combination of substrates, best balances relevance, determinism, runtime cost, context size, and maintenance?
What should the hub and each of the five modes consume, and when should a task reference one coherent real style versus synthesize selected attributes across several styles?
ruledOut: Treating the five-query aggregate P@5 as a general relevance score
Interpreting the zero-positive motion rubric as evidence against either ranker
Claiming semantic lift without a verified generation-bound corpus index and labels
Using BM25 without deterministic mode, provenance, and token-axis eligibility

focus: Define and validate the hub-plus-five-mode consumption contract and deterministic one-coherent-reference versus bounded-synthesis procedure
noveltyJustification: 3 of 6 findings were fully new and 3 partially extended prior mode and payload evidence; closing one open question added the 0.10 simplicity bonus, yielding 0.85.
keyQuestions: What should the hub and each of the five modes consume, and when should a task reference one coherent real style versus synthesize selected attributes across several styles?
Which anti-slop rules and proof gates keep outputs distinctive rather than averaging the corpus into a generic middle?
answeredQuestions: What should the hub and each of the five modes consume, and when should a task reference one coherent real style versus synthesize selected attributes across several styles?
ruledOut: Unbounded mixing of top-ranked styles or averaging token values
Letting corpus rank override routing, user pins, target evidence, mode standards, or live extraction
Treating incidental temporal words as motion evidence
Using multiple study pairs or corpus synthesis in md-generator measured phases
sourcesQueried: read-only temporal-term scans and UTF-8 section-byte measurements

focus: Define and falsify an operational anti-slop proof gate for corpus use, including coherent-source fingerprinting, transformation deltas, trope limits, refusal paths, and audit integration
noveltyJustification: 4 of 6 findings were fully new and 2 partially operationalized prior evidence; closing the anti-slop question added the 0.10 simplicity bonus, yielding 0.93 after rounding.
keyQuestions: Which anti-slop rules and proof gates keep outputs distinctive rather than averaging the corpus into a generic middle?
answeredQuestions: Which anti-slop rules and proof gates keep outputs distinctive rather than averaging the corpus into a generic middle?
ruledOut: Prose-only distinctiveness reminders without blocking evidence
Source citation alone as proof of coherent application
Scalar novelty or similarity scores as anti-slop authority
Audit choosing the thesis or acting as taste authority for sibling modes

focus: Specify the minimal repository-native build, query, refresh, validation, and corpus-change lifecycle for sk-design style retrieval
noveltyJustification: 4 of 6 findings were fully new and 2 partially operationalized prior architecture; closing the tooling question added the 0.10 simplicity bonus, yielding 0.93.
keyQuestions: What index build, query, refresh, validation, and corpus-change tooling is justified by the repository's existing patterns?
answeredQuestions: What index build, query, refresh, validation, and corpus-change tooling is justified by the repository's existing patterns?
ruledOut: A watcher or daemon for a corpus whose bounded inventory and prior manifest build are sub-second
A committed SQLite/FTS database as canonical state
Semantic embeddings before a generation-bound labeled evaluation
Per-mode taste policy embedded in the hub or retrieval engine
Network-dependent capture tests in ordinary PR CI
sourcesQueried: bounded read-only Python corpus inventory output at 2026-07-18T10:11:54.313Z

focus: Rank utilization strategies by leverage, build and operating cost, and provenance, license, staleness, size, and extraction-fidelity risk
noveltyJustification: 3 of 6 findings were fully new and 3 partially extended prior evidence; closing the risk-ranking question added the 0.10 simplicity bonus, yielding 0.85.
keyQuestions: Which retrieval substrate, or layered combination of substrates, best balances relevance, determinism, runtime cost, context size, and maintenance?
How should utilization strategies rank by leverage versus build cost after accounting for size, staleness, licensing, provenance, and extraction fidelity risks?
answeredQuestions: How should utilization strategies rank by leverage versus build cost after accounting for size, staleness, licensing, provenance, and extraction fidelity risks?

Default full-corpus or full-document prompt loading
Watcher, daemon, or network service without measured need
Semantic reranking before a labeled same-generation evaluation

focus: Generation-bound human-auditable holdout and retrieval substrate closure

answeredQuestions: Which retrieval substrate, or layered combination of substrates, best balances relevance, determinism, runtime cost, context size, and maintenance?
